narrative:
Morgan Township has 1,397 registered voters, with 45.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.9 percentage points.
